tasks.check: deno fmt --config deno.json --check . ../build.ts ../page-src && deno lint --no-config src styleguide scripts tests ../build.ts ../page-src && deno check --config deno.json src/mod.ts scripts/build.ts ../build.ts ../page-src/design-system-demo.tsx
tasks.fix: deno fmt --config deno.json . ../build.ts ../page-src && deno lint --no-config --fix src styleguide scripts tests ../build.ts ../page-src
tasks.serve: deno task build && deno serve --host 127.0.0.1 --allow-read --port 8010 scripts/serve.ts
tasks.test: deno task --cwd ../.. site:build && deno test --config deno.json --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env --allow-run tests/design_system_test.ts
tasks.verify: deno task check && deno task build && deno task check:catalogue && deno task test
